infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: IronPath uses your camera to take workout photos and videos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: IronPath accesses your photo library when uploading workout media.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: IronPath saves shareable workout graphics to your photo library.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: IronPath uses the microphone when recording workout videos.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow IronPath to access your camera for workout photos and videos.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow IronPath to save workout graphics to your photos.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Allow IronPath to save shareable workout cards to your photos.
